---
title: External Skills
description: Curated and installed external agent skills
---

import { Aside, Card, CardGrid, LinkCard } from '@astrojs/starlight/components';
import CatalogBrowser from '../../../../../components/CatalogBrowser.astro';
import { externalSkillIndex } from '../../../../../generated-site-data.mjs';

External skills are authored in `docs/src/authoring/skills/*.mdx` and emitted to `docs/public/generated-registries/skills-catalog-index.json`. Legacy `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration. With `--include-installed`, local harness inventory may add rows.

<Aside type="note" title="Trust and provenance">
Audit third-party skills before install. Use [review source](/skills/catalog/custom/review/) and the maintainer notes on each row.
</Aside>

<div class="stats-bar">
  <span class="stat stat-skill">307 External Skills</span>
  <span class="stat stat-installed">127 Install now</span>
  <span class="stat stat-agent">170 Inspect</span>
</div>

Use search and lane filters to browse the external catalog without loading every card at once.

<CatalogBrowser skills={externalSkillIndex} />
